name: Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: Equal amount of Liquid Sugar Substitue
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the liquid egg substitute, sweetener, and vanilla to the creamed mixture and beat for 30 seconds.
3. Stir together the flour, baking powder, dry milk, and cocoa in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the water to the creamed mixture along with the flour mixture, mixing only until smooth.
5. Spread the batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean and the cake easily pulls away from the sides of the pan.
7. Cool to room temperature, then cut into 4 x 4 pieces to yield 16 servings.
Food Exchange Information:
1 Bread Exchange + 2 Fat Exchanges
Calories: 157 per serving
Carbohydrates: 16g per serving
Protein: 3g per serving
Fat: 9g per serving
Note: For low-sodium diets, use salt-free margarine and low-sodium baking powder.
